name: Klar Documentation
description: Official documentation for the Klar programming language. Machine-readable and human-browsable.
ai_instructions: These documents are optimized for AI consumption. Each file includes YAML frontmatter with metadata. Use language-spec.md as a system prompt for Klar code generation.

pages.title: Language Specification
pages.description: Complete syntax, type system, and standard library reference. Designed as an AI system prompt.

pages.title: Getting Started
pages.description: Installation, project setup, hello world, and first API.

pages.title: License
pages.description: Klar is licensed under Apache License 2.0, including terms, obligations, and contributor notes.

pages.title: Compiler Overview
pages.description: How the Klar compiler workspace is structured and how source flows from lexing to codegen.

pages.title: CLI Reference
pages.description: Practical command reference for klar: build, run, check, test, lint, bench, and package commands.

pages.title: Compiler Contributing
pages.description: Practical setup and workflow for contributing to compiler crates.

pages.title: Backends
pages.description: JS, LLVM native/IR, and WASM backend status and usage.

pages.title: Package Manager
pages.description: klar.toml, klar.lock, and init/add/remove command behavior.

pages.title: Diagnostics
pages.description: Human and JSON diagnostic output format for klar check.

pages.title: Language Server (LSP)
pages.description: Build, run, and integrate klar-lsp in your editor.

pages.title: Formatting
pages.description: Current formatter behavior, caveats, and CI usage guidance.
